evidence.snippet: Headquartered in Washington DC Metro, and having additional offices in North America and Europe, Maxtena is at the forefront of wireless innovation.

Germantown MD 20876](https://goo.gl/maps/oTvBP3MNvrz1iWx87)
![](/Content/Img/icons/mail.png) [info@maxtena.com](mailto:info@maxtena.com)
We are engaged in designing, manufacturing and marketing a comprehensive range of embedded, external and custom Advanced RF antennas & systems for GNSS, ISM, SATCOM, MSS and 5G LTE applications.

Our microstrip technology solutions have been integrated in more than thirty thousand devices worldwide. Some of the devices include unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), animal and human tracking applications, consumer electronics and specialized military devices.
Maxtena's ruggedized advanced antennas and wireless solutions are integrated into a variety of platforms including vehicle tracking equipment, UAVs, military tactical radios and manpacks.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures RF antennas (GNSS, SATCOM, LTE, WiFi) sold as components to OEMs and integrators; explicitly serves drones/UAVs as an application market

tagline: Active multi-frequency GNSS antennas (helical and conformal patch) spanning L1–L5 and L-Band, plus phased-array satellite terminals with autonomous tracking and RF cybersecurity. Maryland-based, in production. NDAA compliance status and specific defense contracts not publicly documented.
